json.flavorText: YOU, A CHAMPION OF WAR, STANDARD-BEARER OF VIOLENCE, LET YOUR MARCH BE ENDLESS.
"He walked out into the demon light. But at the end he was brighter." —Paean to Saint-14
“If there is beauty in destruction, why not also in its delivery?” — Feizel Crux
Delivering the inevitable, one pull at a time.
json.displaySource: Random Perks: This item cannot be reacquired from Collections.

json.flavorText: Charge your soul and let the electrons sing.
The flit of tiny wings; the pull of a trigger.
"Shame. Guilt. Fear. We all bear them. Gather your regrets, purge them as best you can. Let your enemies feel the weight of your burdens." —Ada-1

displayProperties.description: Kills with this weapon temporarily grant increased damage. Stacks 3x.
displayProperties.name: Rampage

tooltipNotifications.displayString:
These trait columns can be enhanced once requirements have been met:

• To upgrade left column traits, Tier 2 weapon enhancements are required.
• To upgrade right column traits, Tier 3 weapon enhancements are required.

json.flavorText: Think of space-time as a tapestry on a loom. This weapon is the needle.
The light of dawn burns in the hands of the worthy.
Starlight is your guide. No vacuum will contain you.

displayProperties.description: Damaging an enemy with this weapon has a small chance to reload the magazine and increase movement speed while aiming down sights. Bows receive faster draw speed and swords receive faster charge rate while this perk is active.
displayProperties.name: Veist Stinger

displayProperties.description: Overcharge your grenade, making it deadlier and more effective. Grants an additional grenade charge.
